steps.title: Place all 2 PAXgene tubes in...
steps.instruction: Place all 2 PAXgene tubes in the 4 °C fridge from blood draw if RNA extraction is NOT to be done the next day.

steps.title: Incubate PAXgene Blood RNA Tubes for...
steps.instruction: Incubate PAXgene Blood RNA Tubes for 24:00:00 at Room temperature (25°C) after blood collection or removal from 4°C before processing.

steps.title: Prepare 55°C and 65°C heating blocks
steps.instruction: Prepare 55°C and 65°C heating blocks.

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes at 4000 rpm, 25 °C, 12 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes at 4000 rpm, 25 °C, 12 minutes .

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 4 mL,...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 4 mL, RNase-free water to each tube.

steps.title: Close tube using a fresh secondary Hemogard closure
steps.instruction: Close tube using a fresh secondary Hemogard closure.

steps.title: Vortex 00:00:10 until pellet is dissolved
steps.instruction: Vortex 00:00:10 until pellet is dissolved.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4000 rpm, 25 °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4000 rpm, 25 °C, 10 minutes . Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Add 350 µL, Buffer BR 1...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL, Buffer BR 1 , cap and vortex until the pellet is visibly dissolved.

steps.title: Pipette sample into a 1
steps.instruction: Pipette sample into a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 300 µL, Buffer BR2 and 40 µL, proteinase K
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL, Buffer BR2 and 40 µL, proteinase K .

steps.title: Mix by votexing briefly, then incubate...
steps.instruction: Mix by votexing briefly, then incubate for a total of 10 minutes on a heating block at 55 °C as follows: incubate for 00:05:00 , briefly vortex, incubate 00:05:00 . Do not mix Buffer BR2 and proteinase K together before adding to samples!

steps.title: Pipette lysate directly onto the membrane...
steps.instruction: Pipette lysate directly onto the membrane of a PAXgene Shredder spin column (lilac-colored) placed in a 2 ml processing tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 rpm, 25 °C, 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 rpm, 25 °C, 3 minutes .

steps.title: Carefully pipette supernatant of the flow-through to a 1
steps.instruction: Carefully pipette supernatant of the flow-through to a 1.5 microcentrifuge tube without disturbing pellet.

steps.title: Add 350 µL, 100% ethanol ,...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL, 100% ethanol , mix by votexing, and centrifuge 1000 x g, °C, 2 seconds, 1-2sec at 500-1000 x g to remove drops from inside of the tube lid. Do not centrifuge any longer to avoid pelleting of nucleic acids.

steps.title: Pipette 700 µL, sample into the...
steps.instruction: Pipette 700 µL, sample into the PAXgene RNA spin column (pink) placed in a 2 ml processing tube, and centrifuge at 10000 rpm, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place the spin column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a new 2 ml processing tube.

steps.title: Pipette the remaining sample from step...
steps.instruction: Pipette the remaining sample from step 16 into the spin column and centrifuge at 10000 rpm, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place spin column in a new 2 ml processing tube
steps.instruction: Place spin column in a new 2 ml processing tube.

steps.title: Add 350 µL, Buffer BR3 into...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL, Buffer BR3 into the spin column and centrifuge at 10000 rpm, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place spin column in a new...
steps.instruction: Place spin column in a new 2 ml processing tube and discard old tube.

steps.title: Add 10 µL, DNase I stock...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL, DNase I stock solution to 70 µL, Buffer RDD in a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and mix by gently flicking the tube (do not vortex). Centrifuge briefly to collect residual liquid on sides.

steps.title: Add 80 µL, DNase I incubation...
steps.instruction: Add 80 µL, DNase I incubation mix directly onto the membrane of the spin column, and place on benchtop (20°C - 30°C, Room temperature ) for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Pipette 350 µL, Buffer BR3 into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 350 µL, Buffer BR3 into the spin column and centrifuge at 10000 rpm, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place spin column in a new...
steps.instruction: Place spin column in a new 2 ml processing tube and discard old tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, Buffer BR4 (diluted...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, Buffer BR4 (diluted in 1:4 in 100% ethanol) into the spin column, and centrifuge at 10000 rpm, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place spin column in a new...
steps.instruction: Place spin column in a new 2 ml processing tube and discard old tube.

steps.title: Add another 500 µL, Buffer BR4...
steps.instruction: Add another 500 µL, Buffer BR4 to the spin column and centrifuge at 10000 rpm, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place spin column into a new...
steps.instruction: Place spin column into a new 2 ml processing tube and discard old tube. Centrifuge at 13000 rpm, 25 °C, 3 minutes .

steps.title: Place spin column into a new 1
steps.instruction: Place spin column into a new 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and discard old tube.

steps.title: Add 41 µL, Buffer BR5 directly...
steps.instruction: Add 41 µL, Buffer BR5 directly onto spin column membrane and sit for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10000 rpm, 25 °C, to elute the RNA
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10000 rpm, 25 °C, to elute the RNA.

steps.title: Repeat step 32 with 41 µL,...
steps.instruction: Repeat step 32 with 41 µL, Buffer BR5 and the same microcentrifuge tube: sit for 00:01:00 . Centrifuge for 10000 rpm, 25 °C, to elute the RNA.

steps.title: Combine all two elutes into one tube
steps.instruction: Combine all two elutes into one tube. Split volume in half between two tubes and label (RNA-01 and 02).

steps.title: Place the aliquots in the 65...
steps.instruction: Place the aliquots in the 65 °C heat block for 00:05:00 without shaking. After incubation, chill immediately On ice .

steps.title: Aliquot 3 µL, RNA into a 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 3 µL, RNA into a 1.5 mL tube for Nanodrop concentration assay.

steps.title: Aliquot 2 µL, RNA into a...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 2 µL, RNA into a PCR tube for Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer assay. (Store in -20 °C if not being assay immediately.)

steps.title: Scan and position RNA in the Freezerworks Inventory Program
steps.instruction: Scan and position RNA in the Freezerworks Inventory Program.

steps.title: Store in corresponding -80°C freezer
steps.instruction: Store in corresponding -80°C freezer. Split and store RNA-01 and RNA-02 aliquots in separate freezers in case of freezer failure.
